## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Local-first impact

How does this preserve offline/local-first behavior? Note any new optional dependency.

## Alternatives considered

What simpler approach did you consider first?

## Scope check

- [ ] This is one focused change.
- [ ] This avoids new mandatory runtime dependencies unless explicitly justified.
- [ ] This does not require Docker, SaaS auth, hosted services, or a docs-site migration.
- [ ] I am willing to help with tests or docs.
